name: stitch-docker
title: Stitch Docker Configuration
description: Generic Bun multi-stage container and nginx configuration for a Vite single-page application.

files.content:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

FROM oven/bun:1 AS dependencies
WORKDIR /app

COPY package.json bun.lock ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile

FROM dependencies AS build
WORKDIR /app

COPY . .

# VITE_* values are public client configuration compiled into the bundle at build time.
# Declare an ARG/ENV pair for each value the application needs, then pass --build-arg.
ARG VITE_API_URL=""
ENV VITE_API_URL=${VITE_API_URL}

RUN bun run build

FROM nginx:1.29-alpine AS runtime

RUN touch /var/run/nginx.pid \
  && chown -R nginx:nginx /etc/nginx/conf.d /var/cache/nginx /var/run/nginx.pid

COPY --chown=nginx:nginx --from=build /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html
COPY --chown=nginx:nginx nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

USER nginx

EXPOSE 8080

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=3s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
  CMD wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://127.0.0.1:8080/healthz || exit 1

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

.git
.gitignore
.DS_Store
.env*
.vercel
coverage
dist
node_modules
npm-debug.log*
pnpm-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*

docs: VITE_* variables are public client configuration compiled into the bundle during the image build. Declare and pass each required value as a Docker build argument; runtime environment changes do not rewrite the built bundle.
